DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-09-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT MUNIR SAAD'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled, 10 days to answer. The letter of April 22, complies with Civil Code section 1782 and plaintiff states a cause of action under CC section 1770 (a). Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
